task_completion.description: Configure message body display to plain text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'View' -> 'Message Body As' -> 'Plain Text' being selected in the menu, OR the Config Editor showing 'mailnews.display.html_as' set to 1.

task_completion.description: Configure Thunderbird to expose all email headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'View' -> 'Headers' -> 'All' being selected in the menu, OR the Config Editor showing 'mail.show_headers' set to 2.

task_completion.description: Disable condensed addresses so full email addresses are shown.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Settings -> 'Reading & Display' -> 'Show only display name for people in my address book' being unchecked, OR Config Editor showing 'mail.showCondensedAddresses' as false.

task_completion.description: Block all remote content and tracking pixels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Settings -> 'Privacy & Security' -> 'Allow remote content in messages' being unchecked, OR Config Editor showing 'mailnews.message_display.disable_remote_image' as true.

task_completion.description: Disable the use of custom document fonts in messages.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Settings -> 'Language & Appearance' -> 'Advanced...' -> 'Allow messages to use other fonts' being unchecked, OR Config Editor showing 'browser.display.use_document_fonts' as 0.

task_completion.description: Ensure the settings are applied and visible for the currently loaded emails.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the main Thunderbird window in the final screenshots. An email should be open/selected, showing extensive routing headers (All headers), full email addresses in the header pane, and the body rendered in plain text.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Thunderbird application GUI to configure settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show Thunderbird's Settings tab, Config Editor, or application menus being used.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the GUI by editing configuration files via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing commands like 'sed', 'echo', or text editors modifying 'prefs.js'.

integrity.description: Agent viewed the settings applied to genuine emails.
integrity.visual_evidence: The main Thunderbird window should display real emails from the SpamAssassin corpus, not a mock or empty environment.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Thunderbird configuration values for anti-phishing:
1. Plain Text display: 'mailnews.display.html_as' = 1
2. Expose all headers: 'mail.show_headers' = 2
3. Disable condensed addresses: 'mail.showCondensedAddresses' = false
4. Block remote content: 'mailnews.message_display.disable_remote_image' = true
5. Disable custom document fonts: 'browser.display.use_document_fonts' = 0
These can be verified in the Config Editor (about:config) or the Thunderbird Settings GUI.
